name: automate_credential_rotation
description: Rotate service credentials in target systems and update dependent services. Authorization required.

parameters.name: generate_incident_metric_report
parameters.description: Create an incident metrics report (MTTR, MTTD, detections, playbook coverage) for a time window.

parameters.name: safelist_false_positive
parameters.description: Propose safelist rules or tuning recommendations to reduce false positives for a detection rule.
